hero.text: Embrace the journey, not just the destination.
hero.author: Unknown

aries.general: Today is a day of self-discovery for you, Aries. Embrace new experiences.
aries.love: In love, passion will ignite; be open to vulnerability.
aries.career: Take initiative at work; your ideas will shine.

taurus.general: Appreciate the beauty around you, as it will inspire your creativity.
taurus.love: Connect deeper with your loved one; honesty is your best asset.
taurus.career: Patience is key today; maintain focus on long-term goals.

gemini.general: Communication is your strength; share your thoughts freely.
gemini.love: A playful approach will rekindle the spark in your relationship.
gemini.career: Collaborate with colleagues; teamwork leads to success.

cancer.general: Take time for self-care; your emotional well-being is crucial today.
cancer.love: Nurture your bond with kindness; small gestures mean a lot.
cancer.career: Trust your instincts; they will guide you in making important decisions.

leo.general: Step into the spotlight; confidence will attract opportunities.
leo.love: Romantic gestures will deepen your connection; seize the moment.
leo.career: Showcase your talents; recognition is on the horizon.

virgo.general: Focus on details; small adjustments will yield great results.
virgo.love: A heart-to-heart conversation will strengthen your relationship.
virgo.career: Stay organized; efficiency will be your ally today.

libra.general: Seek harmony; balance in all areas of life brings peace.
libra.love: Romance is in the air; surprise your partner with something special.
libra.career: Networking could open new doors; reach out to connections.

scorpio.general: Your intuition is strong; trust it to guide your decisions.
scorpio.love: Intimacy deepens; share your true feelings to bond more.
scorpio.career: A challenge at work may reveal your hidden strengths.

sagittarius.general: Adventurous spirit calls; seek new experiences and learn.
sagittarius.love: A spontaneous date night can reignite your relationship.
sagittarius.career: Be adventurous; risk-taking may pay off professionally.

capricorn.general: Perseverance leads to success; stay focused on your goals.
capricorn.love: Support your partner’s ambitions; shared goals strengthen bonds.
capricorn.career: Your hard work will not go unnoticed; prepare for recognition.

aquarius.general: Innovative ideas will flow today; let your creativity soar.
aquarius.love: A unique gesture will delight your partner; think outside the box.
aquarius.career: Think collaboratively; joint efforts will lead to exciting results.

pisces.general: Empathy is your superpower; lend an ear to those in need.
pisces.love: Emotional depth enhances your relationships; be open.
pisces.career: Your artistic side may emerge; use it to solve problems.

professional.text: Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.
professional.author: Henry David Thoreau

professional.text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
professional.author: Steve Jobs

professional.text: Opportunities don't happen, you create them.
professional.author: Chris Grosser

professional.text: What lies in our power to do, lies in our power not to do.
professional.author: Aristotle

professional.text: Don't watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
professional.author: Sam Levenson

professional.text: The future depends on what you do today.
professional.author: Mahatma Gandhi

motivation.text: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
motivation.author: Theodore Roosevelt

motivation.text: Push yourself, because no one else is going to do it for you.
motivation.author: Unknown

motivation.text: Great things never come from comfort zones.
motivation.author: Unknown

motivation.text: Dream it. Wish it. Do it.
motivation.author: Unknown

motivation.text: Success doesn't just find you. You have to go out and get it.
motivation.author: Unknown

captions.text: Every day is a fresh start.
captions.author: Unknown

captions.text: Life isn't perfect, but your captions can be!
captions.author: Unknown

captions.text: Just because you're awake doesn't mean you should stop dreaming.
captions.author: Unknown

tech.text: Innovation distinguishes between a leader and a follower.
tech.author: Steve Jobs

tech.text: The best way to predict the future is to invent it.
tech.author: Alan Kay

tech.text: Technology is best when it brings people together.
tech.author: Matt Mullenweg

tech.text: It has become appallingly obvious that our technology has exceeded our humanity.
tech.author: Albert Einstein

tech.text: Any sufficiently advanced technology is indistinguishable from magic.
tech.author: Arthur C. Clarke

tech.text: The science of today is the technology of tomorrow.
tech.author: Edward Teller

fun.text: I'm on a seafood diet. I see food, and I eat it.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: Why don't scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything!
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: I'm reading a book on anti-gravity. It's impossible to put down!
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: Did you hear about the mathematician who’s afraid of negative numbers? He’ll stop at nothing to avoid them!
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: I told my computer I needed a break, and now it won't stop sending me kit-teas!
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: I would avoid the sushi if I was you. It’s a little fishy.
fun.author: Unknown

faith.text: Faith is taking the first step even when you don't see the whole staircase.
faith.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

faith.text: Faith is the bird that feels the light and sings when the dawn is still dark.
faith.author: Rabindranath Tagore

faith.text: What we hope ever to do with ease, we must first do with diligence.
faith.author: Samuel Johnson

faith.text: Faith is believing in something when common sense tells you not to.
faith.author: Unknown

faith.text: Faith is the strength by which a shattered world shall emerge into the light.
faith.author: Helen Keller

faith.text: To be a Christian is to be a light in the world.
faith.author: Unknown

wisdom.text: The unexamined life is not worth living.
wisdom.author: Socrates

wisdom.text: The greater the obstacle, the more glory in overcoming it.
wisdom.author: Molière

wisdom.text: In the middle of every difficulty lies opportunity.
wisdom.author: Albert Einstein

wisdom.text: Knowing yourself is the beginning of all wisdom.
wisdom.author: Aristotle

wisdom.text: The journey of a thousand miles begins with one step.
wisdom.author: Lao Tzu
